title: vscode remote containers - podman over ssh not working
body:
/kind feature

**Description**

I'm trying to use vscode devcontainers with Podman (podman-remote) over ssh. It works with Docker, but fails with Podman.

I've posted this as bug in the vscode issues, but also wanted to created a reference to this issue here as Podman aims for Docker compatibility. (Feel free to close if not relevant).
https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-remote-release/issues/4643

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
whats the status here ... does this still not work because of #2671 or we good or? ?
Reopen if this does not fix the issue.
there are several problems why this doesn’t work (perhaps not all identified), another one is #7360
